phase_prompt.objective: Verify that the single-run stability fix (lastRunOnly=true) correctly returns 100% stability.

verification_steps.step: Select a branch/suite filter in the dashboard
Confirm lastRunOnly=true is passed to the API
Verify stability shows 100% and contributes +30 to score

result.notes: Fix was implemented in commit 9d557a8. When lastRunOnly=true, effectiveDurationCV=0, which results in 100% stability.
